name: Maze
description: User research and testing platform for rapid prototype testing, card sorting, tree testing, surveys and usability analytics with session recordings.

seo.title: Maze — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Maze: User research and testing platform for rapid prototype testing, card sorting, tree testing, surveys and usability analytics with session recordings.

when_to_use: Rapid prototype usability testing with quantitative metrics
Card sorting and tree testing for navigation design
Unmoderated user research with session recordings
Task success rate and misclick heatmaps for UX decisions

pros: Runs unmoderated usability tests on live prototypes quickly
Card sorting and tree testing native, not bolted on
Session recordings tied to specific research tasks
Figma and Sketch integrations streamline UX handoff
cons: Not a production session replay tool despite recording flows
Participant panel recruitment can be slow in niche segments
Advanced research features gated behind higher tiers
Quantitative analytics limited vs dedicated analytics stacks
review.verdict: Strong unmoderated research platform for design teams, but miscategorized if you want production session replay.
review.best_for: UX and design teams validating prototypes and usability pre-launch.
review.not_for: Engineering teams looking for production session replay and error triage.
